response.justification: Bogdan brings 10+ years of full-stack engineering experience with strong alignment to the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which directly matches the AI agent development requirement. His background spans backend microservices, frontend, cloud/containerization, MongoDB, and software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD), making him a strong fit for an internal automation tooling role.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js/React matching primary stack
Active AI-agent and MCP code generator work directly aligned with AI agent requirement
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in resume
Kotlin experience not mentioned; Java exposure appears limited and dated
PostgreSQL/relational DB experience light compared to MongoDB focus

key_factors.factor: Primary stack and AI agent alignment
Depth of full-stack and craftsmanship experience
